title: trisetum glabratum
intro: Trisetum glabratum, also known as rough oat grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Trisetum glabratum include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, coughs, and sore throats.
